# 

## WHAT DOES THIS RESOURCE PACK EVEN DO?

So what this resource pack does is it makes iit that you have more fps and makes the clouds look smoother and low quality and that there will be no rain or any entity droping from the sky it will just be empty and make it less so no entity will show up.
